MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GLASS, CHARLES SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR FEB-15-2000 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON FEB-28-2000 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

ASSIGNED TO D001, JUDGE: D.GIRARD. CLK: B.HING. RPTR: F. BUTLER. PLTFF'S COUNSEL: J.SACRAMENTO. DFDNTS IN PRO PER. SETT CONF HELD. CASE SETTLED. STIPULATION OF SETTLEMENT PLACED ON THE RECORD. COUNSEL TO PREPARE ORDER. DFDNT TO VACATE PREMISES BY 2/28/00; IF DFDNT PAYS RENT OF $1,050.00 BEFORE 2/21/00, THEN HIS MOVEOUT DATE IS 3/31/00; POSS OF PREMISES; LEASE FORFEITURE. IF DFDNT FAILS TO VACATE BY SAID DATE, THEN PLTFF CAN MAKE AN EXPARTE APPLICATION AND COLLECT BACK RENT, DAMAGES, ATTY'S FEES/COSTS. IF TERMS & CONDITIONS ARE MET, THEN PLTFF SHALL FILE A DISMISSAL ON THE ENTIRE ACTION. (001, GIRARD)
